// Xbox Shader Assembler 1.00.5933.1
// instructions: 12
xvs.1.1
#pragma screenspace
/*slot stall */
/*   0        */  mov r0.xyz, c4.xyz
                 +   mov oT0.x, v0.w
/*   1        */  mov r9.x, c6.x
                 +   mov oT0.y, v2.w
/*   2        */  add r7.xyz, -r0.xyz, c5.xyz
/*   3 C 0.50 */  mad r9.yzw, r7.xxyz, v0.xxyz, c4.xxyz
/*   4        */  nop 
/*   5 D 0.20 */  dp4 oPos.x, r9.yzwx, c0
/*   6        */  dp4 oPos.y, r9.yzwx, c1
/*   7        */  dp4 oPos.z, r9.yzwx, c2
/*   8        */  dp4 oPos.w, r9.yzwx, c3
/*   9        */  mul oPos.xyz, r12.xyz, c-38.xyz
/*  10        */  rcc r11.x, r12.w
/*  11 C 0.50 */  mad oPos.xyz, r12.xyz, r11.x, c-37.xyz

//Stall Types:
//C: standard stall
//D: shadow-stall from using a register two instructions after it stalled

//    microcode: 12 slots, 7.2 cycles, cpi = 0.6
// Optimization saved 0 slots, 0.8 cycles.
